# t66 — bulk keeps the s008.9 aggregate (generic failure; never a per-item
# sentinel): a not-found id + a failing delete event in one call. Per-item
# stderr carries the saved-marker + remaining; --json rows carry `remaining`.
exec mtt init
cp events.yaml .mtt/config.yaml

exec mtt add 'a'
exec mtt add 'b'
exec mtt use t1

! exec mtt rm t1 ghost
stderr 'ghost.*not found'
stderr 't1: .*exited 1'
stderr 'the change IS saved; do NOT re-run the mutation'
stderr '^  false$'

# the deletion itself happened (mutation kept despite the failed event) and the
# current pointer was cleared — a deleted task must not leave a dangling current
# even when its event finalization failed (t66 review F1)
exec mtt list --ids
stdout 't2'
! stdout 't1'
exec mtt use
stdout 'no current task'

# --json rows carry the remaining recovery commands
exec mtt add 'c'
! exec mtt rm t3 t99 --json
stdout '"remaining"'
stdout '"error"'

-- events.yaml --
version: 1
project: {name: evtest}
events:
  task:
    delete:
      post: ['false']
types:
  - name: task
    prefix: t
    default: true
    statuses:
      - {name: tbd, kind: initial}
      - {name: doing, kind: active}
      - {name: done, kind: terminal}
    transitions:
      - {from: tbd, to: doing}
      - {from: doing, to: done}
